description: Oracle is NOT a tollbooth-dpyc wheel consumer, so the fleet's SDK-propagation preset doesn't apply. Python deps (fastmcp, nostr-sdk) are bumped by hand with `uv lock` regen because Horizon builds from uv.lock — a pyproject-only bump wouldn't reach the deploy. Renovate here keeps only GitHub Actions current, quietly: one weekly batch, dashboard off, all actions grouped into a single PR.

packageRules.description: All GitHub Actions bumps in one PR; owner reviews (no auto-merge — Oracle deploys off uv.lock and a green CI here isn't a full deploy gate).
